mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product_imgs WHERE pid = #{pid} and isShow = 1;
SELECT * FROM product_imgs WHERE id = #{id} AND isShow = 1;
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO product_imgs(pid, img, addTime, updateTime) VALUES
(#{proimgEntity.pid}, #{proimgEntity.img}, #{proimgEntity.addTime}, #{proimgEntity.updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE product_imgs SET pid = #{pid}, img = #{img}, updateTime = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id};

UPDATE product_imgs SET isShow = 0 WHERE id IN
#{id}
